title: sorghastrum pohlianum
intro: Sorghastrum pohlianum, also known as Black Hill dropseed, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Sorghastrum pohlianum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and infusions added to topical creams and ointments.
